html:
Light Flowers are plants that serve as sources of light that can normally be found in Caves and Ruins. They are generated all over the caves but mostly spawn in Muddy biome.

Light Bulbs can be picked from Light Flowers. There are three types of light flowers, each yielding a different number of Light Bulbs.

The Light Flower is a small light source, capable of protecting the player from Charlie's attacks. It ceases to act as a light source once picked. The double- and triple-bulb plants yield 2 and 3 bulbs respectively when picked. It takes 3 days for a flower with one bulb to regrow, 4–5 days for a two-bulbed flower, and 6 days to spawn a three-bulbed flower.

Light Flowers cannot be relocated elsewhere with a shovel, and are thus limited to their natural habitat in Caves and Ruins.

The Light Flowers are lit when another light source is present. They remain on for 94 to 98 seconds and then enter a dormant phase where they do not produce light. The dormant phase lasts from 114 to 128 seconds, after which they can be turned on again.

They are also renewable through Regrowth. The Reanimated Skeleton also creates a trail of Light Flowers as it walks, which can be picked for their bulbs. However, these Light Flowers disappear after a few seconds.

Light Flowers in Lunar Grotto release Bulbous Lightbugs upon harvesting. When the Lightbug returns to the plant, it returns to normal. (Any Light Flower can be turned into version that releases Bulbous Lightbug by mutating it with Lunar Experiment).

Withered Light Flower

Exclusive to:

Withered Light Flowers can be found in the Fumarole Biome. They work similar to a normal light flower, though emitting a smaller light and yields Rot when picked.

Trivia

  • Light Flowers were added in the Underground update.
  • Withered Light Flowers were added in the Ancient Echoes update.

Assets

  • Single Picked
  • Single Off
  • Springy Picked
  • Springy Off
  • Double Picked
  • Double Off
  • Triple Picked
  • Triple Off

Gallery

  • Wilson examining a Light Flower.
  • Map icons of multiple Light Flowers.
  • Multi-bulb Light Flowers in a Cave Set Piece.
  • A bugged Light Flower.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Science makes it glow.”
–Wilson
“It's burning inside.”
–Willow
“Is light plant.”
–Wolfgang
“It looks fragile.”
–Wendy
“POWER SOURCE: UNKNOWN”
–WX-78
“You could read by that light.”
–Wickerbottom
“Shiny!”
–Woodie
“It's so dark down here.”
–Maxwell
“Is it radioactive? I hope so.”
–Wagstaff
“And it lit up the night, upön the darkest höur.”
–Wigfrid
“Oooh, a glowing ball of flower!”
–Webber
“I want a whole wreath of them!”
–Walani
“Ah, a light in the dark.”
–Warly
“Thet thar be a pretty flower.”
–Woodlegs
“WHAT LIGHT!”
–Wilba
“Glowy friend”
–Wormwood
“It's growing projectiles!”
–Wheeler
“Woah! It doesn't even need electricity!”
–Winona
“How kind of you to light my way.”
–Wortox
“Useless flower, florph.”
–Wurt
“Will I start glowing if I eat it?”
–Walter
“I don't have time to stop and smell the flowers.”
–Wanda

Light Bulbs can be picked from Light Flowers. There are three types of light flowers, each yielding a different number of Light Bulbs.

The Light Flowers are lit when another light source is present. They remain on for 94 to 98 seconds and then enter a dormant phase where they do not produce light. The dormant phase lasts from 114 to 128 seconds, after which they can be turned on again.
They are also renewable through Regrowth. The Reanimated Skeleton also creates a trail of Light Flowers as it walks, which can be picked for their bulbs. However, these Light Flowers disappear after a few seconds.

"flower_cave_withered"
Exclusive to:
“It's dim bulb.”
–Wilson
“It's inner flame is dying.”
–Willow
“Light plant is fading.”
–Wolfgang
“There's a sadness about how it flickers.”
–Wendy
“POWER SOURCE: DIMINISHED”
–WX-78
“It will not survive in these conditions.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's almost out.”
–Woodie
“Just great.”
–Maxwell
“Sö fleeting is this mörtal saga!”
–Wigfrid
“It's not glowing much.”
–Webber
“The light grows dim.”
–Warly
“Glowy friend dying”
–Wormwood
“That bulb needs changing.”
–Winona
“The light will not last.”
–Wortox
“Not so glowy.”
–Wurt
“I wonder why it's dying.”
–Walter
“This flower's time is running out.”
–Wanda
Withered Light Flowers can be found in the Fumarole Biome. They work similar to a normal light flower, though emitting a smaller light and yields Rot when picked.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Light Flowers were added in the Underground update.
Withered Light Flowers were added in the Ancient Echoes update.
